calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ANIL GULATI'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. Plaintiff Anil Gulati's motion to confirm arbitration award, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Order is signed. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Amended Notice Of Hearing Re Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Petitioner ANIL GULATI's Amended Motion to Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner ANIL GULATI's Amended Motion to Confirm Arbitration Award is ordered OFF CALENDAR. The Amended Petition is incomplete in that it purports to include as an exhibit the arbitration award, but no such exhibit was provided; nor does it appear the substance of the award is adequately set forth. (See Code Civ. Proc., 1284.5.) Additionally, Petitioner Anil Gulati has not filed proof of service of any of the papers associated with the amended petition. (See Code Civ. Proc., 1290.4.)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ANIL GULATI's Petition Confirming Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and, at the request of counsel for the moving party (per their email dated 6/11/23), this matter is taken off calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
